notes: half-day local fishing trip join the ahra-ahn at long beach sportfishing for a half-day fishing trip targeting a variety of local species including rockfish, sculpin, bass (seasonal), barracuda (seasonal), and more. trip details price: $75 per person check-in: please arrive no later than 9:00 am includes: bait only additional information rental rods, fishing licenses, and tackle are available at check-in no ice chests, outside food, or beverages permitted full galley onboard with breakfast, lunch, drinks, beer, and snacks available for purchase boat is cash only this trip is ideal for anglers of all experience levels looking for a fun and productive local fishing experience. *12 minimum to run on weekdays, 10 minimum to run on weekends
comment: half-day local fishing trip join the ahra-ahn at long beach sportfishing for a half-day fishing trip targeting a variety of local species including rockfish, sculpin, bass (seasonal), barracuda (seasonal), and more. trip details price: $75 per person check-in: please arrive no later than 9:00 am includes: bait only additional information rental rods, fishing licenses, and tackle are available at check-in no ice chests, outside food, or beverages permitted full galley onboard with breakfast, lunch, drinks, beer, and snacks available for purchase boat is cash only this trip is ideal for anglers of all experience levels looking for a fun and productive local fishing experience. *12 minimum to run on weekdays, 10 minimum to run on weekends

notes: enjoy a half day of local coastal fishing. we will be searching for a variety of game fish, including , bass, sculpin, whitefish & sanddabs. galley and restrooms on board. food & drink is available for purchase during the trip. - fishing license required for anyone 16 years or older. license and rod rentals are extra. 60yo & older = senior - 15yo & younger = junior - these items are not permitted on board! alcohol, coolers, drugs & glass - smoking nicotine (cigarettes/e-cigarettes) is allowed - crew may search bags before boarding, please do not bring non-permitted items.
